## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, integration pages, and performance metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/sKq_ccKVgA1-_uBhdvfydsMAf6GsRBR_?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Integration pages need prioritization and refinement; team agreed to create tiered system (1-3) for focus](https://fathom.video/share/sKq_ccKVgA1-_uBhdvfydsMAf6GsRBR_?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [New approach for integration pages: summarize key info, link to official third-party docs where possible](https://fathom.video/share/sKq_ccKVgA1-_uBhdvfydsMAf6GsRBR_?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [Content performance shows positive trends; e-commerce and plugin articles performing well](https://fathom.video/share/sKq_ccKVgA1-_uBhdvfydsMAf6GsRBR_?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Team working to improve Strapi V5 references in new and refreshed content](https://fathom.video/share/sKq_ccKVgA1-_uBhdvfydsMAf6GsRBR_?tab=summary&timestamp=2130.0)

## Topics

### Performance Metrics

  - [Overall uptick in performance: \~8,000 more impressions week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/sKq_ccKVgA1-_uBhdvfydsMAf6GsRBR_?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Current week is second-best for clicks, best for impressions](https://fathom.video/share/sKq_ccKVgA1-_uBhdvfydsMAf6GsRBR_?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [New non-cumulative charts added to track weekly growth in clicks and impressions](https://fathom.video/share/sKq_ccKVgA1-_uBhdvfydsMAf6GsRBR_?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)

### Integration Pages Strategy

  - [33 integration pages ready in backend; 8 uploaded recently](https://fathom.video/share/sKq_ccKVgA1-_uBhdvfydsMAf6GsRBR_?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Issue with pages being live prematurely resolved; new rule added to only display when "published" is true](https://fathom.video/share/sKq_ccKVgA1-_uBhdvfydsMAf6GsRBR_?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Team discussing approach to ensure accuracy, especially for code examples](https://fathom.video/share/sKq_ccKVgA1-_uBhdvfydsMAf6GsRBR_?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Agreed to prioritize pages into tiers (1-3); Maxime to own Tier 1](https://fathom.video/share/sKq_ccKVgA1-_uBhdvfydsMAf6GsRBR_?tab=summary&timestamp=1199.0)
  - [New workflow: summarize integration, link to official third-party docs where possible](https://fathom.video/share/sKq_ccKVgA1-_uBhdvfydsMAf6GsRBR_?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
  - [AI to be leveraged for content generation, but human review still necessary](https://fathom.video/share/sKq_ccKVgA1-_uBhdvfydsMAf6GsRBR_?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
  - [New Airtable tab to be created for tracking integration page status and priorities](https://fathom.video/share/sKq_ccKVgA1-_uBhdvfydsMAf6GsRBR_?tab=summary&timestamp=1763.0)

### Content Updates

  - [42 articles published in total; 7 more in drafts](https://fathom.video/share/sKq_ccKVgA1-_uBhdvfydsMAf6GsRBR_?tab=summary&timestamp=2093.0)
  - [10 new content refreshes completed](https://fathom.video/share/sKq_ccKVgA1-_uBhdvfydsMAf6GsRBR_?tab=summary&timestamp=2225.0)
  - [Working on adding more Strapi V5 references to articles](https://fathom.video/share/sKq_ccKVgA1-_uBhdvfydsMAf6GsRBR_?tab=summary&timestamp=2130.0)
  - [Optimizing metadata for articles with high impressions but low clicks](https://fathom.video/share/sKq_ccKVgA1-_uBhdvfydsMAf6GsRBR_?tab=summary&timestamp=2049.0)

### Refresh Process

  - [New V2 refresh workflow launched, not yet fully implemented](https://fathom.video/share/sKq_ccKVgA1-_uBhdvfydsMAf6GsRBR_?tab=summary&timestamp=2307.0)
  - [Refreshes focus on adding relevant, broad content without deep technical changes](https://fathom.video/share/sKq_ccKVgA1-_uBhdvfydsMAf6GsRBR_?tab=summary&timestamp=2353.0)
  - [Emphasis on internal linking and expanding on search intent](https://fathom.video/share/sKq_ccKVgA1-_uBhdvfydsMAf6GsRBR_?tab=summary&timestamp=2374.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Create new Airtable tab for integration pages by Friday (Andrej)](https://fathom.video/share/sKq_ccKVgA1-_uBhdvfydsMAf6GsRBR_?tab=summary&timestamp=1991.0)
  - [Maxime to stack-rank integration pages into tiers](https://fathom.video/share/sKq_ccKVgA1-_uBhdvfydsMAf6GsRBR_?tab=summary&timestamp=1199.0)
  - [Team to review and provide feedback on 7 new draft articles](https://fathom.video/share/sKq_ccKVgA1-_uBhdvfydsMAf6GsRBR_?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
  - [Continue implementing V5 references in new and refreshed content](https://fathom.video/share/sKq_ccKVgA1-_uBhdvfydsMAf6GsRBR_?tab=summary&timestamp=2130.0)
  - [Explore AI solutions for code generation in integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/sKq_ccKVgA1-_uBhdvfydsMAf6GsRBR_?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
  - [Review and push live new content as it becomes available](https://fathom.video/share/sKq_ccKVgA1-_uBhdvfydsMAf6GsRBR_?tab=summary&timestamp=2393.0)
